Logic
…guration/BL10E_HeXI [400]/Library/C15862H_Lib/2In_Discrepency_Alarm
(X: 0, Y: 0) 
j
k
l
m
n
156
713
Discrepency Alarm
This function block compares the twi inputs for discrepency between
them. If a discrepency is detected the output will be HIGH.
The Delay_Time input is use to delay the output from going HIGH to
reduce nuisance alarm. The default delay value is set to 500ms.
Input1
=2k+1
TON
IN
Q
PT
ET
Output
Input2
Delay_Time

(X: 0, Y: 0) 
j
k
l
m
n
161
713
Discrepency Alarm
This function block compares the three inputs and if one of the input is
different to the other two will output a HIGH on the corresponding
output.
The Delay_Time input is use to delay the output from going HIGH to
reduce nuisance alarm. The default delay value is set to 500ms.
Input1
=
&
TON
IN
Q
PT
ET
Output3
Input2
Delay_Time
Input3
=
&
TON
IN
Q
PT
ET
Output1

…/Configuration/BL10E_HeXI [400]/Library/C15862H_Lib/Transition_Timer
(X: 0, Y: 0) 
j
k
l
m
n
285
713
Transition Timer
This function block is use to measure the transition time by measuring the time that the
input, Start_Timer is ON.
If Start_Timer is ON for more than Max_Time then Exceed_Max_Time will be SET.
If Start_Timer is ON for less than Min_Time then Below_Min_Time will be SET.
The output Transition_Time shows the elapsed time and will freeze when Start_Timer is
OFF or when the timer reach Max_Time.
These output will RESET when input Reset is ON
SR

R

Voltage Transmitters
STATUS-BEAM_ON
RS
S
Q1
R1
STATUS-OPEN
DOOR_UNLOCK_DELAY
Open/Reset pushbutton (B10E-PS-OR-01) will only activate once
2oo3 current and 2oo3 voltage instrument has registered 0 voltage/
current for at least DOOR_UNLOCK_DELAY (currently set at 20s).
After this period, B10E-PS-OR-01_LED will light up indicating that the
Open/Reset pushbutton can be pressed.
